title: pelargonium × argutum
intro: Pelargonium × argutum, also known as the Silver-leaved Geranium, is a hybrid species of the pelargonium genus, characterized by its attractive silvery-green foliage and vibrant flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium × argutum have been linked to several health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, alleviating digestive problems, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Pelargonium × argutum are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
